description: Classify a substance or mixture to GHS / EU CLP (with REACH registration and SDS duties) and author or maintain a 16-section Safety Data Sheet — hazard class + category, pictograms, signal word, H/P statements, and §8 exposure controls ranked through the hierarchy of controls (engineering before PPE). Use it to classify a chemical, write an SDS, check CLP labelling, or work out REACH SDS / registration duties. Refuses to invent a hazard class on absent data — flags [GAP] and routes to a competent person / further testing. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output, which is never an authoritative regulatory SDS.
name: ghs-classification-sds-author
